modules.name: Module 1: Scalability, Capacity Math & Network Routing

topics.title: System Design Fundamentals
subtopics: Functional vs Non-Functional requirements, SLA metrics

topics.title: Capacity Estimation
subtopics: DAU/MAU to QPS, bandwidth, and storage math calculations

topics.title: Network Routing
subtopics: DNS resolution flow, CDNs edge caching, and Load Balancer algorithms (L4 vs L7)

topics.title: Proxies & Gateways
subtopics: Reverse vs Forward proxies, API Gateway routing, and rate limiting algorithms (Leaky/Token bucket, sliding log)

topics.title: Microservices
subtopics: Service Discovery, Registry, and Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) patterns

modules.name: Module 2: Communication Models, Caching Topologies & Resiliency

topics.title: Communication Models
subtopics: Sync (REST, gRPC) vs Async (Message Queues, Pub-Sub), Webhooks

topics.title: Caching Basics
subtopics: Cache Hit vs Miss, Cache Eviction (LRU, LFU), and Cache Invalidation

topics.title: Caching Patterns
subtopics: Cache-Aside, Write-Through, Write-Back, and Write-Around

topics.title: Distributed Caching
subtopics: Redis vs Memcached architecture comparison, cache stampede prevention

topics.title: Reliability Patterns
subtopics: Retries, Timeouts, Circuit Breaker state machines, and Bulkheads

modules.name: Module 3: Database Architectures, Scaling & Distributed Transactions

topics.title: Database Design
subtopics: SQL vs NoSQL, CAP Theorem, ACID vs BASE models

topics.title: Concurrency Anomalies
subtopics: Dirty read, non-repeatable read, write skew and phantom read; database isolation levels

topics.title: Database Indexing
subtopics: Clustered vs Non-Clustered index, B+ Trees, and Index Selection

topics.title: Database Scaling
subtopics: Vertical vs Horizontal, Master-Slave replication, Sharding, and Consistent Hashing ring virtual nodes

topics.title: Distributed Transactions
subtopics: Two-Phase Commit (2PC) coordinator failures, and Saga pattern (Orchestration vs Choreography)

modules.name: Module 4: Event-Driven Systems, Logging & Object Storage

topics.title: Event-Driven Architecture
subtopics: Events, Producers, Consumers, and Message Queues (RabbitMQ)

topics.title: Distributed Log
subtopics: Kafka: Topics, Partitions, Consumer Groups, Offsets, and DLQ

topics.title: Storage Systems
subtopics: Blob & Object Storage (S3), File Storage, and Block Storage

topics.title: Observability
subtopics: Centralized Logging, Metrics collection, and Distributed Tracing

topics.title: CQRS Pattern
subtopics: Command Query Responsibility Segregation, read/write database splits

modules.name: Module 5: Real-World Case Studies & Scaling AI Infrastructures

topics.title: Case Study: URL Shortener design
subtopics: Database schema, and hashing collision handling

topics.title: Case Study: Chat System
subtopics: WebSockets vs Long Polling, status synchronization

topics.title: Case Study: Video Streaming
subtopics: CDN caching, chunking, adaptive bitrate, and Notification service

topics.title: AI System Design
subtopics: Vector Databases (HNSW, IVF-PQ indices), and Vector Embeddings pipelines

topics.title: AI Systems Scaling
subtopics: RAG pipeline retrieval/rerank, and scaling LLM serving caching
